notebooklm-mcp.description: NotebookLM MCP Server (jacob-bd/notebooklm-mcp v0.1.15 / notebooklm v3.3.1, 32 tools — notebook_list, notebook_create, notebook_get, notebook_describe, source_describe, notebook_query, research_start, audio_overview_create, mind_map_create, etc.). Authenticated via cookies cached at ~/.notebooklm-mcp/auth.json (run `notebooklm-mcp-auth` to re-auth if cookies expire).
